glosses.ja: 主張する; 断言する

translations.de: Ich stehe jetzt zu meiner Entscheidung.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在明确表明我的选择。
translations.yue: 我而家清楚表明我嘅選擇。
translations.pt: Agora deixo clara a minha escolha.
translations.vi: Giờ tôi khẳng định lựa chọn của mình.
translations.nl: Ik maak nu mijn keuze duidelijk.
translations.hi: मैं अभी अपने निर्णय की पुष्टि करता हूँ.
translations.ja: 今、私の選択を表明します。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular (je); means ‘to assert/affirm’.
1st person singular possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the assertion.

sentences.target: Tu affirmes ton point de vue devant nous.
sentences.reading: /ty a.fiʁm tɔ̃ pwɛ̃ də vy də.vɑ̃ nu/

translations.fr: Tu affirmes ton point de vue devant nous.
translations.ipa: /ty a.fiʁm tɔ̃ pwɛ̃ də vy də.vɑ̃ nu/
translations.en: You state your point of view in front of us.
translations.es: Expresas tu punto de vista delante de nosotros.
translations.de: Du vertrittst deinen Standpunkt vor uns.
translations.it: Esponi il tuo punto di vista davanti a noi.
translations.ko: 너는 우리 앞에서 네 의견을 밝힌다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在我们面前陈述你的观点。
translations.yue: 你喺我哋面前表達你嘅觀點。
translations.ru: Ты высказываешь свою точку зрения перед нами.
translations.pt: Você expõe seu ponto de vista diante de nós.
translations.vi: Bạn trình bày quan điểm của mình trước chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Je verwoordt je standpunt voor ons.
translations.uk: Ти висловлюєш свою точку зору перед нами.
translations.hi: तुम हमारे सामने अपना दृष्टिकोण रखते हो.
translations.pl: Przed nami przedstawiasz swój punkt widzenia.
translations.el: Παρουσιάζεις την άποψή σου μπροστά μας.
translations.nb: Du legger fram ditt synspunkt foran oss.
translations.id: Kamu menyampaikan sudut pandangmu di depan kami.
translations.sv: Du framför din ståndpunkt inför oss.
translations.ro: Îți prezinți punctul de vedere în fața noastră.
translations.da: Du fremlægger dit synspunkt foran os.
translations.ja: あなたは私たちの前で自分の意見を述べます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular (tu).
2nd person singular possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun.
Common noun; head of the compound expression ‘point de vue’.
Preposition ‘of’, linking ‘point’ and ‘vue’ in the fixed expression.
Common noun; complement of ‘point de’ in the expression ‘point de vue’.
Preposition meaning ‘before/in front of’, introducing the complement ‘nous’.
1st person plural tonic pronoun; object of the preposition ‘devant’.

sentences.target: Il aime affirmer ses opinions en réunion.
sentences.reading: /il ɛm a.fiʁ.me se zɔ.pi.njɔ̃ ɑ̃ ʁe.y.njɔ̃/

translations.fr: Il aime affirmer ses opinions en réunion.
translations.ipa: /il ɛm a.fiʁ.me se zɔ.pi.njɔ̃ ɑ̃ ʁe.y.njɔ̃/
translations.en: He likes to assert his opinions in meetings.
translations.es: Le gusta hacer valer sus opiniones en las reuniones.
translations.de: Er bringt in Besprechungen seine Meinung gern deutlich zum Ausdruck.
translations.it: Gli piace far valere le sue opinioni nelle riunioni.
translations.ko: 그는 회의에서 자신의 의견을 분명히 밝히는 것을 좋아한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他喜欢在会议上坚定地表达自己的观点。
translations.yue: 佢鍾意喺會議上清楚表達自己嘅意見。
translations.ru: Ему нравится отстаивать своё мнение на совещаниях.
translations.pt: Ele gosta de fazer valer suas opiniões nas reuniões.
translations.he: הוא אוהב להביע את דעותיו בישיבות.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thích khẳng định ý kiến của mình trong các cuộc họp.
translations.ar: هو يحب أن يؤكد آراءه في الاجتماعات.
translations.nl: Hij houdt ervan om zijn mening te laten gelden in vergaderingen.
translations.uk: Йому подобається відстоювати свою думку на нарадах.
translations.hu: Szereti érvényre juttatni a véleményét a megbeszéléseken.
translations.hi: उसे बैठकों में अपनी राय दृढ़ता से रखना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubi stanowczo wyrażać swoje zdanie na spotkaniach.
translations.el: Του αρέσει να υποστηρίζει τις απόψεις του στις συναντήσεις.
translations.nb: Han liker å gjøre sitt syn tydelig i møter.
translations.id: Dia suka menegaskan pendapatnya dalam rapat.
translations.sv: Han gillar att göra sin åsikt tydlig på möten.
translations.ro: Îi place să își susțină opiniile la ședințe.
translations.cs: Rád si na poradách prosazuje své názory.
translations.da: Han kan godt lide at gøre sin mening tydelig på møder.
translations.fi: Hän pitää siitä, että tuo mielipiteensä selvästi esiin kokouksissa.
translations.ja: 彼は会議で自分の意見をはっきり主張するのが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun (masculine).
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘aime’.
3rd person possessive determiner; plural form agreeing with ‘opinions’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘affirmer’.
Preposition indicating location/context (‘in a meeting’).
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘en’.

sentences.target: Ils affirment leur version des faits.

translations.fr: Ils affirment leur version des faits.
translations.en: They assert their version of the facts.
translations.es: Sostienen su versión de los hechos.
translations.de: Sie bestehen auf ihrer Sicht der Dinge.
translations.it: Sostengono la loro versione dei fatti.
translations.ko: 그들은 사실에 대한 자기들의 해석을 주장한다.
translations.pt: Eles sustentam a sua versão dos fatos.
translations.vi: Họ khẳng định cách mình trình bày sự việc.
translations.nl: Zij houden fast aan hun versie van de feiten.
translations.hu: Ragaszkodnak a saját verziójukhoz a tényekről.
translations.hi: वे तथ्यों के अपने संस्करण पर अड़े रहते हैं.
translations.pl: Oni obstają przy swojej wersji wydarzeń.
translations.el: Επιμένουν στη δική τους εκδοχή των γεγονότων.
translations.nb: De står fast ved sin versjon av hendelsene.
translations.id: Mereka mempertahankan versi mereka tentang kejadian.
translations.sv: De står fast vid sin version av händelserna.
translations.ro: Ei susțin versiunea lor a faptelor.
translations.da: De fastholder deres version af begivenhederne.
translations.fi: He pitävät kiinni omasta versiostaan tapahtumista.
translations.ja: 彼らは事実についての自分たちの見解を主張する。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; liaison may occur before vowel-initial verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural (ils).
3rd person plural possessive determiner; agrees with singular noun ‘version’.
Common noun; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the article ‘les’; introduces the noun complement ‘faits’.
Common noun, plural; object of the contracted preposition ‘des’.
